zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Beare Dermod O'Sullivan Mor於大約1480年出生時，他的父親Lord Dunkerron Donal The Swarthy O'Sullivan Bere21歲，母親Lady Mary FitzGerald6歲。他於大約1535年與Lady Julia MacCarthy在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克科克結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1549年在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克登波享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord Beare Dermod O'Sullivan Mor于大约1480年出生时，他的父亲Lord Dunkerron Donal The Swarthy O'Sullivan Bere21岁，母亲Lady Mary FitzGerald6岁。他于大约1535年与Lady Julia MacCarthy在爱尔兰庫迪 科克科克结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1549年在爱尔兰庫迪 科克登波享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: O'Sullivan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donal, Liam, Siobhan, Declan, Kieran, Cathal, Dermot, Eamon, Fergus, Grainne, Seamus.
Irish (Munster): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Súileabháin ‘descendant of Súileabhán’, a personal name from súil ‘eye’ + dubh ‘dark’ + the diminutive suffix -án. Compare Sullivan .

variants.name: Sullivan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Liam, Donal, James Patrick, Michael Patrick, Aileen, Brigid, Paddy, Siobhan, John Patrick, Kevin Patrick, Parnell.
Irish (Cork and Kerry): shortened form of   O'Sullivan  .

nameMeanings.name: Dermod
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of the Irish name Diarmaid , now also used elsewhere in the English-speaking world. In Irish legend, Diarmaid was the lover of Gráinne, who had been promised to the ageing hero Finn mac Cumhaill, leader of the Fianna. The lovers eloped, but were pursued for sixteen years by Finn; according to one version of the story, Diarmaid was eventually killed by a wild boar and Gráinne died of grief.

variants.name: Diarmaid
meanings: Earlier Diarm(u)it, of uncertain derivation; perhaps from dí ‘without’ + airmit ‘injunction’ or airmait ‘envy’. See also Dermot .

historicEvents.description: Henry VIII dies, succeeded by the boy king Edward VI. England and Ireland were ruled by the senior nobility of England.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Beare Dermod O'Sullivan Mor was born about 1480, his father, Lord Dunkerron Donal The Swarthy O'Sullivan Bere, was 21 and his mother, Lady Mary FitzGerald, was 6. He married Lady Julia MacCarthy about 1535, in Cork, County Cork, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died about 1549, in Dunboy, County Cork, Ireland, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord Beare Dermod O'Sullivan Mor est né environ 1480, son père, Lord Dunkerron Donal The Swarthy O'Sullivan Bere, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Lady Mary FitzGerald, avait 6 ans. Il a épousé Lady Julia MacCarthy environ 1535, à Cork, County Cork, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé environ 1549, à Dunboy, County Cork, Irlande, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord Beare Dermod O'Sullivan Mor um 1480 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Dunkerron Donal The Swarthy O'Sullivan Bere 21 und seine Mutter Lady Mary FitzGerald 6. Er hat um 1535 in Cork, County Cork, Irland Lady Julia MacCarthy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb um 1549 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Dunboy, County Cork, Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Beare Dermod O'Sullivan Mor è nato il circa 1480, il suo padre, Lord Dunkerron Donal The Swarthy O'Sullivan Bere, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Lady Mary FitzGerald, aveva 6 anni. Lui sposato Lady Julia MacCarthy circa 1535, nel Cork, County Cork, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1549, nel Dunboy, County Cork, Irlanda, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord Beare Dermod O'Sullivan Morが約1480年に生まれた時，父Lord Dunkerron Donal The Swarthy O'Sullivan Bereは21歳，母Lady Mary FitzGeraldは6歳であった。約1535年にアイルランドコウントイ コルクコルクでLady Julia MacCarthyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は約1549年にアイルランドコウントイ コルクダンボイで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Beare Dermod O'Sullivan Mor(이)가 대략 1480년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Dunkerron Donal The Swarthy O'Sullivan Bere(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Mary FitzGerald(은)는 6세였다. 그는 대략 1535년 아일랜드 카운티 코르크 코르크에서 Lady Julia MacCarthy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1549년 아일랜드 카운티 코르크 던보이에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1480–Abt. 1549: tany ho any amin'ny 1480–tany ho any amin'ny 1549

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Beare Dermod O'Sullivan Mor nasceu aproximadamente 1480, seu pai, Lord Dunkerron Donal The Swarthy O'Sullivan Bere, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Lady Mary FitzGerald, tinha 6 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Julia MacCarthy aproximadamente 1535, em Cork, County Cork, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1549, em Dunboy, County Cork, Irlanda, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord Beare Dermod O'Sullivan Mor родился около 1480 г., его отцу по имени Lord Dunkerron Donal The Swarthy O'Sullivan Bere было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Mary FitzGerald, 6. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Julia MacCarthy около 1535 г. в местности корк, коунти корк, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер около 1549 г. в местности дунбои, коунти корк, Ирландия в возрасте 71 год.

sm.about 1480–Abt. 1549: e tusa o le 1480–e tusa o le 1549

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord Beare Dermod O'Sullivan Mor nació aproximadamente 1480, su papá, Lord Dunkerron Donal The Swarthy O'Sullivan Bere, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Lady Mary FitzGerald, tenía 6 años. Se casó con Lady Julia MacCarthy aproximadamente 1535, en Cork, County Cork, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1549, en Dunboy, County Cork, Irlanda, a la edad de 71 años.
